name: NEON BLASTER
description: Neon Blaster is a fast-paced retro arcade space shooter! Pilot your neon fighter through waves of enemy ships and face epic bosses in this electrifying horizontal shootem up. Collect power-ups, unlock special weapons and survive the ultimate cosmic threat. Stunning synthwave visuals, explosive action and pure arcade gameplay make every wave a new challenge. Can you blast your way to victory and liberate the galaxy?
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: free html5 games for your website
